title: PwD Profile Management - Functional Test Plan (30 Test Cases)
overview: Functional testing of SCRUM-293: PwD Profile Management. Validates profile navigation & access, profile header (name, email, tags, export), personal information read/edit, wishlist tab with device cards, inquiries tab with AP contact details, settings tab with export/delete, and header persistence across all tabs.

testCases.title: Unauthenticated user is redirected away from profile page
steps: Verify redirect to login or home page.
expectedResults: User is redirected away from profile page.

testCases.title: Authenticated PWD can access profile via direct URL
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as PWD.
expectedResults: Profile page loads via direct URL.

testCases.title: Profile tab is selected by default on page load
steps: Verify Profile tab has active state.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the profile page.
expectedResults: Profile tab is selected by default.

testCases.title: Tab switching does not cause page reload errors
steps: Verify no console errors or page crashes.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the profile page.
expectedResults: No console errors or page crashes when switching tabs.

testCases.title: Header displays user full name
steps: Verify .atad-up-name is visible with non-empty text.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the profile page.
expectedResults: User full name is visible in header.

testCases.title: Header displays user email
steps: Verify .atad-up-email is visible with email text.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the profile page.
expectedResults: User email is visible in header.

testCases.title: Header displays contextual tags (location, occupation, disability)
testCases.preconditions: User is on the profile page.
expectedResults: Contextual tags (location, occupation, disability) are visible.

testCases.title: Export Data button is visible in header
steps: Verify Export Data button/link is visible.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the profile page.
expectedResults: Export Data button is visible in header.

testCases.title: Personal Information section is visible with fields
steps: Verify Personal Information section is visible.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the profile page.
expectedResults: Personal Information section with fields is visible.

testCases.title: Fields are read-only by default
steps: Verify input fields are disabled or read-only.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the profile page.
expectedResults: Input fields are disabled or read-only.

testCases.title: Edit Profile button is visible
steps: Verify Edit Profile button is visible.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the profile page.
expectedResults: Edit Profile button is visible.

testCases.title: Clicking Edit Profile enables editable fields with Save/Cancel
steps: Verify Save and Cancel buttons appear.
expectedResults: Fields become editable with Save and Cancel buttons.

testCases.title: Clicking Cancel reverts to read-only mode
expectedResults: Clicking Cancel reverts to read-only mode.

testCases.title: Wishlist tab is clickable and displays content
steps: Verify wishlist panel content is visible.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the profile page.
expectedResults: Wishlist tab is clickable and displays content.

testCases.title: Wishlist shows device count indicator
steps: Verify device count text is visible.
expectedResults: Device count indicator is visible.

testCases.title: Each wishlist card shows device image, name, and price
steps: Verify first card has image, name, and price.
expectedResults: First card shows device image, name, and price.

testCases.title: Each wishlist card has View Details CTA
steps: Verify View Details link/button on card.
expectedResults: View Details CTA is present on card.

testCases.title: View Details navigates to product/catalog page
steps: Click View Details on first wishlist card.
expectedResults: View Details navigates to product page.

testCases.title: Wishlist bookmark toggle is present on cards
steps: Verify bookmark icon/toggle is visible on cards.
expectedResults: Bookmark toggle is visible on cards.

testCases.title: Inquiries tab is clickable and displays content
steps: Verify inquiries panel content is visible.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the profile page.
expectedResults: Inquiries tab is clickable and displays content.

testCases.title: Inquiry items show device name and image
steps: Verify inquiry items have device name and image.
expectedResults: Inquiry items show device name and image.

testCases.title: Inquiry items show device price
expectedResults: Inquiry items display price.

testCases.title: Inquiry items show AP contact details
steps: Verify AP contact details (name, phone, email) are shown.
expectedResults: AP contact details (name, phone, email) are shown.

testCases.title: Settings tab is clickable and displays content
steps: Verify settings panel content is visible.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the profile page.
expectedResults: Settings tab is clickable and displays content.

testCases.title: Export Data / Download your data section is visible
steps: Verify Export/Download data section is visible.
expectedResults: Export/Download data section is visible.

testCases.title: Delete Account section is visible
steps: Verify Delete Account section is visible.
expectedResults: Delete Account section is visible.

testCases.title: Export Data button is functional
steps: Verify Export All Data button is clickable.
expectedResults: Export All Data button is clickable.

testCases.title: Header name and email remain visible on Wishlist tab
steps: Verify header name and email are still visible.
expectedResults: Header name and email remain visible.

testCases.title: Header name and email remain visible on Inquiries tab
steps: Verify header name and email are still visible.
expectedResults: Header name and email remain visible.

testCases.title: Header name and email remain visible on Settings tab
steps: Verify header name and email are still visible.
expectedResults: Header name and email remain visible.
